title: Wire RuntimeConfig into launcher + ForkDaemon + daemon
description: Core refactor: (1) agent_setup.go builds RuntimeConfig and writes it before forking. (2) ForkDaemon simplified to take sessionDir + resumeSessionID + TerminalHints. (3) newDaemonCmd simplified to --session-dir + --resume-session-id. (4) RunDaemon takes *RuntimeConfig, daemon writes updated metadata on startup (new session_id for resume, harness_session_id via OnSessionStarted). (5) Remove SessionMetadata, ForkDaemonOpts, RunDaemonOpts. Update all tests.
